passives.name: Time
passives.description: Every few seconds gain bonus Magic Power and Max HP, stacking up to a maximum. Exact per-stack values pending wiki verification.

passives.name: Gift
passives.description: When HP drops below 50%, recovers a portion of HP over 3 seconds; when Mana drops below 50%, restores a portion of Mana over 3 seconds. Cooldown: 60 seconds.
